name: Home Control
description: Control smart home devices via natural language.

problem.statement: Users want to control all their smart home devices using natural language across multiple providers.

examples: I need to list rooms from HA
Can you list rooms from HA?
I need to sync rooms from HA
Can you sync rooms from HA?
I need to list entities from HA
Can you list entities from HA?
I need to get device state
I need to call HA service
I need to discover LG TV
I need to list TV apps
I need to list TV inputs
I need to list HC appliances
I need to get HC status
I need to list HC programs
I need to start HC program
I need to stop HC program
I need to check providers status
I need to list Hue rooms
I need to list Hue devices
I need to get Hue state
I need to list Hue scenes
I need to activate Hue scene
I need to check Hue status
I need to list Tuya devices
I need to get Tuya state
Can you help me device functions?
I need to list Google devices
I need to google device state

out_of_domain.message: This request is outside my capabilities.

scenarios.title: List rooms from HA
scenarios.description: User triggers "List rooms from HA" (e.g. "List rooms from HA") and the agent handles it end-to-end.
steps: Agent calls rooms.list — list rooms from ha
Agent presents results to the user
scenarios.expected_outcome: The agent successfully handles the "List rooms from HA" request and presents the result.

scenarios.title: Sync rooms from HA
scenarios.description: User triggers "Sync rooms from HA" (e.g. "Sync rooms from HA") and the agent handles it end-to-end.
steps: Agent calls rooms.sync — sync rooms from ha
Agent presents results to the user
scenarios.expected_outcome: The agent successfully handles the "Sync rooms from HA" request and presents the result.
